verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I love You, Jesus I worship and adore You Just want to tell You Lord, I love You more than anything

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I love You, Jesus I worship and adore You Just want to tell You Lord, I love You more than anything

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I love You, Jesus I worship and adore You Just want to tell You Lord, I love You more than anything

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord, I love You more than anything Lord, I love You more than anything
